comments.comment: Previous estimations of air emissions assumed a 1% loss of nitric acid from the enclosed storage tank to atmosphere.  This resulted in a gross overestimation of emissions of this substance.  The wash tanks where the nitric acid is are at a concentration and temperature which results in a very low vapor pressure (effectively 2.33E-09 kPa) at which no emissions are expected.
